about.title: Farghal X
about.bio: I don't just talk about AI; I build it. Based in Kuala Lumpur, I specialize in architecting n8n workflows that connect your existing tools to custom AI agents. From automated WhatsApp lead responders to deep content generation pipelines, I replace busywork with logic.
about.cta_desc: Whether you need a custom knowledge base, a lead qualifying agent, or an entire content engine, I can build the backend to run it seamlessly.

services.industry_desc: We focus on practical, ROI-driven systems for service-based businesses.

portfolio.page_desc: Detailed showcase of AI automation systems that transformed businesses and saved thousands in operational costs.

projects.title: AI Sales Research Agent
projects.problem: Sales teams waste hours researching clients manually. B2B SaaS company's 5-person sales team spent 2-3 hours per prospect researching company websites, LinkedIn profiles, and recent news.
projects.solution: Built an AI agent that summarizes LinkedIn + website insights in seconds with automated scraping, profile extraction, and personalized opening lines.

projects.title: WhatsApp CRM System
projects.problem: Car dealership overwhelmed with 80+ daily WhatsApp inquiries asking repetitive questions about availability, pricing, and test drives. 4+ hour response times caused lost leads.
projects.solution: Designed end-to-end WhatsApp CRM automation with AI intent recognition, automatic loan calculations, live inventory checks, and 24/7 instant responses.

projects.title: Balqiso Trade Inventory Tracker
projects.problem: Wholesale clothing business owner spent 15 hours/week manually tracking inventory across 3 supplier spreadsheets, leading to frequent stockouts and over-ordering.
projects.solution: Created all-in-one Google Sheets system with centralized dashboard, automatic profit calculations, reorder alerts, and real-time analytics.
